（本书慢热，且为粉丝向作品，作者文笔一般。）
↑以上为叠甲。
林科作为一只普通的僵尸被召唤而来。
他继承了老前辈的诊所，兢兢业业，总是对患者充满了热情。
他的身边有只小章鱼，天天住在他的影子里。
但是有些患者不知道为什么，对他的态度越来越尊敬，对他取了各种称号：
“拉莱耶之主”
“那位大人”
“...”
当某一天他摆脱了神明的愚弄，他开始触及真相。
“世界......原来是这样子的吗？”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o91640215b6f33d913630c22d32fa74d3~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"浅子稚","author_id":"","book_id":"7185933858875902991","book_name":"克苏鲁世界：我在那开诊所的日子","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#181818","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1823人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1014,"name":"都市高武","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1014&name=都市高武&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":391,"name":"无女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=391&name=无女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":516,"name":"都市异能","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=516&name=都市异能&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":705,"name":"克苏鲁","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=705&name=克苏鲁&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7186292213734146597","read_count":"1823","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1032597"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.1","serial_count":"446","tags":"都市高武,都市,穿越,无女主,都市异能,克苏鲁","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o91640215b6f33d913630c22d32fa74d3~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779384582&x-signature=MizR%2B6mn7MlCUB%2BflHk439XBZFk%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"902054898053664","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"508"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230129424E7311F23E91C5053F78"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读8小时后点评"},"stat":{"dig
